name: guardian-secrets-scanner
description: Advanced security scanner that detects passwords, API keys, tokens, and sensitive data across all file types with entropy analysis and custom pattern detection

commands.title: Guardian: Scan Entire Workspace for Secrets

guardian.scanOnSave.markdownDescription:
**RECOMMENDED: `true`** | Scan files as you save them

- Catches secrets before commit
- Minimal performance impact
- Only disable if saving large files causes lag

guardian.scanOnOpen.markdownDescription:
**RECOMMENDED: `false`** | Scan files as you open them

- Useful for reviewing existing code
- ⚠️ Warning: Can cause startup lag
- Enable only for high-risk projects

guardian.enableEntropyAnalysis.description: Use entropy analysis to detect hidden secrets
guardian.enableEntropyAnalysis.markdownDescription:
**RECOMMENDED: `true`** | Detect randomness-based secrets

- Finds auto-generated tokens & passwords
- Detects UUIDs pattern matching misses
- Slightly slower but catches more secrets

guardian.entropyThreshold.markdownDescription:
**RECOMMENDED: `4.5`** | Entropy threshold (3.0-6.0)

- `3.0` = Catches more (detects 'password123')
- `4.5` = **Balanced** (default, recommended)
- `6.0` = Strict (only highly random strings)

> Scale: ~2=repetition, ~3.5=predictable, ~4.5+=likely secret!

guardian.excludePatterns.markdownDescription:
**RECOMMENDED: [default values]** | Skip scanning these folders

- Prevents scanning node_modules, dist, build
- Add custom: `**/test/**`, `**/*.min.js`
- Improves performance by 30-50%

guardian.severityLevel.markdownDescription:
**RECOMMENDED: `medium`** | Minimum severity level to report

- `critical` = Only critical alerts
- `high` = Critical + high
- `medium` = Critical + high + medium (default)
- `low` = All alerts

> Start with 'medium', adjust if too many/few alerts

guardian.customPatterns.markdownDescription:
**OPTIONAL** | Add custom regex patterns for your secrets

- Company-specific secrets
- Internal tokens
- Custom API keys

> Use command 'Guardian: Add Custom Detection Pattern' for UI help

guardian.scanBinaryFiles.markdownDescription:
**RECOMMENDED: `false`** | Scan Microsoft Office & PDF files

- ⚠️ **Warning**: Adds 10-30s overhead
- Only enable if you commit docs with secrets
- Most teams leave disabled for performance

guardian.git.blockOnCritical.markdownDescription:
**RECOMMENDED: `true`** | Prevent committing critical secrets

- Blocks AWS keys, private keys, DB passwords
- Best practice: always enabled
- Only disable in emergencies
- Works with pre-commit hook

guardian.git.blockOnHigh.description: Block commits with high severity secrets
guardian.git.blockOnHigh.markdownDescription:
**OPTIONAL** | Prevent committing high severity secrets

- Blocks API keys, OAuth tokens
- Set `true` for strict teams
- Set `false` for flexibility
- Evaluate based on team risk tolerance

guardian.git.autoScanStaged.markdownDescription:
**RECOMMENDED: `true`** | Auto-scan before committing

- Checks only staged files (faster)
- Additional protection layer
- Works best with blockOnCritical
- Requires Git extension

> Set to `true` for maximum safety
